description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6 Docker image. Define a test stage with a py36_nose job that runs apt-get update -q -y, then pip install -r requirements.txt, then nosetests -c .noserc -q --with-coverage --cover-html-dir=build --cover-html --cover-package=groupBug/. The job should publish the generated HTML coverage report by storing the htmlcov/ directory as an artifact. No services, caches, or special rules are required.
